cv_data.raw_text:
SENIOR AI/ML ENGINEER

Experienced AI/ML Engineer with 5+ years building production machine learning systems. Expertise in deep learning, NLP, computer vision, and MLOps.

SKILLS
Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, RAG, LLM Fine-tuning, GPT, Claude API, Generative AI, Foundation Models, Multimodal AI, Computer Vision, NLP, Reinforcement Learning, MLOps, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, MLflow, Weights & Biases, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Git, CI/CD

EXPERIENCE
Senior ML Engineer | TechCorp Ltd | London | 2022-Present
- Built production RAG pipeline serving 10M+ queries/month
- Fine-tuned LLMs (Llama, Mistral) for domain-specific tasks
- Deployed models on Kubernetes with auto-scaling

ML Engineer | DataCo | Manchester | 2020-2022
- Developed computer vision system for quality inspection
- Built NLP pipeline for document classification

EDUCATION
Master of Science - Artificial Intelligence | University of Edinburgh | 2020
Bachelor of Science - Computer Science | University of Bristol | 2018
cv_data.summary: Senior AI/ML Engineer with 5+ years experience in production ML systems

preferences.about_me: Senior AI/ML engineer specializing in production LLM systems and RAG pipelines
